title: festuca vaginata subsp. dominii
intro: Festuca vaginata subsp. dominii, also known as Domin's fescue, is a subspecies of grass in the genus Festuca. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Festuca vaginata subsp. dominii can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
